steps.title: Use the value of y
steps.content: The second equation gives $y=21$. Substitute into $y=3x-3$: $$21=3x-3$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Add $3$ to both sides and divide by $3$: $$24=3x$$ $$x=8$$

steps.title: Check both coordinates
steps.content: A solution to a system must satisfy both equations. The pair $(8,21)$ has $y=21$, and it also satisfies $21=3(8)-3$, so both equations are true.
